name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or developer workflow improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want to add.

## Why It Matters

Explain the impact for CRUXpider users, contributors, or maintainers.

## Scope

- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Frontend / UX
- [ ] Docs / repo ops
- [ ] AI4Science / research assets

## Extra Context

Links, references, or examples from similar tools.
